historical Plan 013 iPhone 17 Simulator candidate run

decoderControlBoundaries.implementation: synchronous pure-Dart EXT-v0 decode and GLB rewrite
decoderControlBoundaries.allocationControl: declared-output and aggregate rewrite budgets use atomic commit outside the decoder loop
decoderControlBoundaries.timeoutControl: cooperative Dart deadline checkpoints are enforced across claimed modes and filters
decoderControlBoundaries.resourceRelease: timed-out decode buffers become garbage-collectible after stack unwind; deterministic collection is not guaranteed
decoderControlBoundaries.blockingApi: synchronous decode accepts an internal deadline control but no external cancellation signal
decoderControlBoundaries.bridgeContract: not applicable; Meshopt has no native MethodChannel bridge

decoderControlBoundaries.implementation: synchronous pinned Google Draco 1.5.7 native decode
decoderControlBoundaries.allocationControl: bridge preflight and output budgets do not bound allocations inside Decoder::DecodeMeshFromBuffer
decoderControlBoundaries.timeoutControl: Dart deadline enforced; native work is not stopped
decoderControlBoundaries.resourceRelease: bridge-owned RAII scopes unwind after synchronous decode returns; deadline or cancellation release is not established
decoderControlBoundaries.blockingApi: draco::Decoder::DecodeMeshFromBuffer(DecoderBuffer*) exposes no deadline, cancellation callback, or allocator budget
decoderControlBoundaries.bridgeContract: decodeGlb is one MethodChannel request and response; Dart discards a late response, but no deadline or cancellation signal enters native code

decoderControlBoundaries.implementation: synchronous pinned Basis Universal KTX2 native transcode
decoderControlBoundaries.allocationControl: bridge preflight and output budgets do not bound allocations inside init, start_transcoding, or transcode_image_level
decoderControlBoundaries.timeoutControl: Dart deadline enforced; native work is not stopped
decoderControlBoundaries.resourceRelease: bridge-owned RAII scopes unwind after synchronous transcode returns; deadline or cancellation release is not established
decoderControlBoundaries.blockingApi: ktx2_transcoder init, start_transcoding, and transcode_image_level expose no deadline, cancellation callback, or allocator budget
decoderControlBoundaries.bridgeContract: decodeGlb is one MethodChannel request and response; Dart discards a late response, but no deadline or cancellation signal enters native code
